title: Dazzling Energizing Southern Thai Pear Skewers
description: A funky and fluffy Southern Thai dish featuring pears, this air-fry recipe is high in protein and perfect for a snack or dessert. It combines the natural sweetness of pears with the savory flavors of Southern Thai cuisine.

ingredients.name: pears
ingredients.notes: any variety, cored and cut into 1-inch pieces

instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together coconut milk, fish sauce, lime juice, honey, and chili flakes.
Add the pear pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated pear pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Spray the air fryer basket with air-fryer spray and cook the skewers for 10 minutes, shaking halfway through.
While the skewers are cooking, mix together toasted peanuts, salt, and chopped cilantro in a small bowl.
Once the skewers are done, sprinkle the peanut mixture over the top of each skewer.
Garnish with additional cilantro if desired.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours.
